title: Replace Auto-Incrementing Account ID with GUID
description:
Replace the auto-incrementing numeric account ID with a GUID to prevent sequential ID enumeration. The original concern was that auto-incrementing IDs exposed in URLs could be guessed or enumerated.

The resolution was to remove the account ID from URLs entirely, routing to `/myaccounts/` instead of `/myaccounts/{id}`. This eliminated the security concern without needing to change the underlying ID generation strategy.
acceptance_criteria: Account ID is not exposed in any user-facing URL
Account page routes to /myaccounts/ without an ID parameter
Account lookup uses session-based context instead of URL parameters
middleware_changes: Account routing changed from /myaccounts/{id} to /myaccounts/, using session-based account context instead of URL-based ID lookup.
implementation_notes: Rather than implementing a GUID column, the developer resolved the security concern by removing the account ID from URLs entirely. The account context is now derived from the authenticated session.
comment_summary: Developer noted that the account ID was removed from URLs entirely (routing to /myaccounts/ only), questioning whether a GUID was still needed. This effectively resolved the security concern.
